description: drift-sentinel — a read-only /drift-check skill detecting framework (origin↔upstream), branch-behind/append-file, and cron-staleness drift, with heartbeat integration. Detect-and-report only.

userStories.title: Author the /drift-check skill
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I want a /drift-check skill that detects framework, branch-behind, and cron-staleness drift so I catch silent divergence before it costs a session.
acceptanceCriteria: .claude/skills/drift-check/SKILL.md exists with YAML frontmatter (name: drift-check; description block ending in a 'TRIGGER when:' line), mirroring .claude/skills/ci-status/SKILL.md shape

## Instructions has three labeled subsections; grep -cE '^### \((A|B|C)\)' .claude/skills/drift-check/SKILL.md returns 3: (A) Framework drift (origin↔upstream), (B) Branch-behind / append-file drift, (C) Host/state drift (cron-staleness)

Section (A): preflight 'git remote get-url upstream' (skip with a diagnostic if absent); timeout-wrapped offline-safe 'git fetch upstream'; on success 'git rev-list --left-right --count origin/development...upstream/development' reports N-behind, derives paths via 'git diff --name-only origin/development...upstream/development', and prints remediation 'git checkout upstream/development -- <those-paths>' (never a pathless checkout, never executed)

Section (B): uses 'git branch --show-current', timeout-wrapped 'git fetch origin', 'git rev-list --left-right --count HEAD...origin/<branch>', 'git status --porcelain'; reports behind/ahead, dirty-tree, and unexpected-branch (expected=development; OK if branch matches ^(feat|fix|task|audit|skill|agent)/)

Section (C): resolves system-cron runtime start time via crons/.pid + /proc/<pid>/stat, falls back to tmux '#{session_created}', else surfaces an 'unavailable' message; reports crons/*.md with mtime strictly after start time as 'inert until restart' and recommends restarting the runtime; defers deep host triage to /health-check with a cross-reference

Read-only guarantee: file contains no commit/push/pull/reset/merge/rebase, no working-tree-mutating checkout/restore, no host-mutating command; 'git fetch' (remote-tracking refs only) is the sole permitted, non-destructive write; the skill states it never mutates branches/tree/history/host
Output contract: prints a one-line-per-class summary; a clean class prints a single 'OK' token (no multi-line block)
Pre-commit hook (lint + tests) passes

userStories.title: Register /drift-check in the Skills table and protected-paths
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I want /drift-check listed in the root Skills table and protected from accidental deletion, since the heartbeat now depends on it.
acceptanceCriteria: AGENTS.md Skills table gains exactly one new row for /drift-check with a ≤15-word trigger description; grep -c '`/drift-check`' AGENTS.md returns 1
Existing table rows unchanged; Markdown pipe-alignment / table validity preserved (AGENTS.md is session-load-bearing)
.claude/protected-paths.txt gains a bare 'drift-check' entry under the '# --- Orchestrator skills' section
Pre-commit hook (lint + tests) passes
userStories.notes: Done 2026-06-10; AGENTS.md Skills row + protected-paths.txt entry.

userStories.title: Integrate /drift-check into the heartbeat
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I want the hourly heartbeat to run /drift-check and surface findings so drift is caught automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: crons/heartbeat.md gains a new task step numbered 2.7 (after step 2.5, before step 3) invoking /drift-check and surfacing findings in the log + reply as 'DRIFT: <summary>'; on an all-clean result the heartbeat appends nothing extra (HEARTBEAT_OK unchanged)
The '### Permitted validation checks (step 2.5 must use only these)' block is byte-identical to its pre-edit content
The new step references /drift-check by name and does not duplicate the skill's command logic inline
Change is additive-only — no existing heartbeat content is deleted or deprecated; rollback is a plain git revert
Pre-commit hook (lint + tests) passes
userStories.notes: Done 2026-06-10; crons/heartbeat.md step 2.7 added, allowlist byte-identical.

userStories.title: Record the change in the changelog
userStories.description: As the orchestrator, I want the changelog to note the new skill so release notes capture it.
acceptanceCriteria: CHANGELOG.md gains one entry under '## [Unreleased] → ### Added' describing the /drift-check skill + heartbeat integration in imperative mood, with a valid ([#7](url)) link to issue #7 (no placeholder)
No duplicate changelog entry; the '### Added' subheading is created under [Unreleased] only if absent
Pre-commit hook (lint + tests) passes
